name: Super food Macaroni Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and black pepper, to taste

method: Cook macaroni as directed on package. When cooked through but al dente, remove from heat, drain and rinse.
Combine the mayonnaise, garlic and lemon juice in a bowl. Add the eggs, salmon, onions and spinach and toss to
coat with the dressing. Season with salt and freshly ground pepper to taste.
This summertime staple is easy, fast, and always a crowd-pleaser. It’ll work with any kind of vegetable and you can
even make it gluten-free if you need to.
Pasta salad is the perfect dish for those days when you are looking for something quick to throw together before
heading outside for a BBQ, so let’s get to it!
